key_insight: Objective: Survival analysis is central to medical prediction, yet large language models (LLMs) are rarely used as end-to-end survival models because censoring prevents straightforward supervised fine-tuning.
engineering_relevance: Potential relevance: fracture and damage workflows and research evaluation.
